creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ru
Date: Tue May 24 06:56:40 2011
New Revision: 222245
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/222245

Log:
  Ensure there is a whitespace after a mount point.
  
  PR:		157286
  Submitted by:	Marcus Reid
  MFC after:	3 days

Modified:
  head/usr.bin/showmount/showmount.c

Modified: head/usr.bin/showmount/showmount.c
==============================================================================
--- head/usr.bin/showmount/showmount.c	Tue May 24 06:46:07 2011	(r222244)
+++ head/usr.bin/showmount/showmount.c	Tue May 24 06:56:40 2011	(r222245)
@@ -185,7 +185,7 @@ main(int argc, char **argv)
 		printf("Exports list on %s:\n", host);
 		exp = exportslist;
 		while (exp) {
-			printf("%-35s", exp->ex_dirp);
+			printf("%-34s ", exp->ex_dirp);
 			grp = exp->ex_groups;
 			if (grp == NULL) {
 				printf("Everyone\n");
